name: Anakin Skywalker / Vader
description:
˚₊·͟͟͟͟͟͟͞͞͞͞͞͞➳❥ ꒰ I am what you made me. ꒱ | ೃ࿔₊•

Luke Skywalker has assured the galaxy that his father is a changed man. That Anakin Skywalker was Darth Vader no more. Barely anybody believed him, and if they did, then they were considered just as insane. But Anakin is willing to keep on trying to prove it, even if nobody wants him around.
creator: chanelbootluke
